title: A Primer on the EU AI Act: What It Means for AI Providers and Deployers
titleZh: 欧盟人工智能法案入门：它对人工智能提供商和部署者意味着什么
summary: We’re sharing a preliminary overview of the EU AI Act including upcoming deadlines and requirements, with a particular focus on prohibited and high-risk use cases
summaryZh: 我们将分享《欧盟人工智能法案》的初步概述，包括即将到来的截止日期和要求，特别关注被禁止和高风险的用例
highlights: We’re sharing a preliminary overview of the EU AI Act including upcoming deadlines and requirements, with a particular focus on prohibited and high-risk use cases
highlightsZh: 我们将分享《欧盟人工智能法案》的初步概述，包括即将到来的截止日期和要求，特别关注被禁止和高风险的用例

title: SearchGPT is a prototype of new AI search features
titleZh: SearchGPT是全新AI搜索功能的原型
summary: We’re testing SearchGPT, a temporary prototype of new search features that give you fast and timely answers with clear and relevant sources.
summaryZh: 我们正在测试SearchGPT ，这是新搜索功能的临时原型，可为您提供快速及时的答案，并提供清晰相关的来源。
highlights: We’re testing SearchGPT, a temporary prototype of new search features that give you fast and timely answers with clear and relevant sources.
highlightsZh: 我们正在测试SearchGPT ，这是新搜索功能的临时原型，可为您提供快速及时的答案，并提供清晰相关的来源。

title: Improving Model Safety Behavior with Rule-Based Rewards
titleZh: 通过基于规则的奖励改善模型安全行为
summary: We've developed and applied a new method leveraging Rule-Based Rewards (RBRs) that aligns models to behave safely without extensive human data collection.
summaryZh: 我们开发并应用了一种利用基于规则的奖励（ RBR ）的新方法，该方法可以调整模型，使其在无需大量人类数据收集的情况下安全运行。
highlights: We've developed and applied a new method leveraging Rule-Based Rewards (RBRs) that aligns models to behave safely without extensive human data collection.
highlightsZh: 我们开发并应用了一种利用基于规则的奖励（ RBR ）的新方法，该方法可以调整模型，使其在无需大量人类数据收集的情况下安全运行。

title: Prover-Verifier Games improve legibility of language model outputs
titleZh: Prover-Verifier游戏提高了语言模型输出的可读性
summary: Discover how prover-verifier games improve the legibility of language model outputs, making AI solutions clearer, easier to verify, and more trustworthy for both humans and machines.
summaryZh: 了解Prover-verifier游戏如何提高语言模型输出的易读性，使AI解决方案更清晰、更易于验证，并且更值得人类和机器信赖。
highlights: Discover how prover-verifier games improve the legibility of language model outputs, making AI solutions clearer, easier to verify, and more trustworthy for both humans and machine

title: OpenAI and Los Alamos National Laboratory announce research partnership
titleZh: OpenAI和洛斯阿拉莫斯国家实验室宣布建立研究合作关系
summary: OpenAI and Los Alamos National Laboratory are working to develop safety evaluations to assess and measure biological capabilities and risks associated with frontier models.
summaryZh: OpenAI和洛斯阿拉莫斯国家实验室正在开展安全评估，以评估和衡量与前沿模型相关的生物能力和风险。
highlights: OpenAI and Los Alamos National Laboratory are working to develop safety evaluations to assess and measure biological capabilities and risks associated with frontier models.
